title: Squirrel Removal in East Flatbush, Brooklyn | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in East Flatbush, Brooklyn. Licensed experts remove squirrels from attics, walls & roofs. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast, humane removal. $900 – $2,500.
intro: East Flatbush homeowners know that squirrels can quickly invade attics, crawl spaces, and wall voids in the neighborhood's beautiful single-family homes and multi-family residences. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout East Flatbush, from the tree-lined streets near Brooklyn College to the bustling areas along Flatbush Avenue. Our experienced technicians safely and humanely remove squirrels while preventing future infestations in your Brooklyn property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served East Flatbush residents for years with reliable, humane squirrel removal that addresses both the immediate problem and long-term prevention. Our licensed technicians know the unique challenges of Brooklyn's housing stock and provide guaranteed solutions with transparent pricing from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of your infestation.
localContext: East Flatbush's mix of pre-war homes, Victorian houses, and brick apartment buildings near Kings Theatre and along Church Avenue provides numerous entry points for squirrels seeking shelter. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to green spaces like Parade Grounds make squirrel activity particularly common, especially during fall and winter months when these pests seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in East Flatbush typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and the amount of damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into East Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter East Flatbush homes through damaged roof vents, uncapped chimneys, gaps in soffits and fascia, and openings around utility lines. The neighborhood's older homes often have small gaps that squirrels can chew through or squeeze into, especially around the roofline and attic areas.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my East Flatbush property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, contaminating spaces with urine and feces, and creating entry points that allow other pests inside. They can also be noisy and disruptive, especially during early morning and evening hours when they're most active.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my East Flatbush home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to East Flatbush service calls within 24 hours and can begin removal immediately. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and their location, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent future invasions.
